error.capacity_details: ndinoda %d bits, kugona kwakanyanya pa k=1 i %d bits
error.empty_coefficients: chikamu che coefficient hachifanirwe kunge chisina chinhu
error.insufficient_capacity: meseji yakakura zvakanyanya kuti isakwanise kuverengerwa coefficient
error.insufficient_coefficients: ma coefficients asina kukwana panguva yekuisa: inoda %d, yakawana %d
error.insufficient_header_coefficients: ma coefficients asina kukwana ekuisa musoro: inoda 32 bits, yakawana %d chete ma coefficients anoshandiswa
error.invalid_coefficient_range: kukosha kwekodhesiti hakusi kwehuwandu hwakakodzera (-2048 kusvika 2047)
error.invalid_force_k: ForceK isiriyo: inofanira kunge iri 0 (auto) kana 1-8
error.invalid_k_parameter: parameter ye k inofanira kunge iri pakati pe1 ne8
error.matrix_encode_failed: Kunyora matrix kwakundikana pa kodhi yezwi: %v
error.message_too_large: Saizi yemeseji inodarika huwandu hwakabvumidzwa (8,388,607 bytes)
error.nil_random_source: source isina kurongeka haigone kuva isina: shandisa InitializePRNG(password) kana kupa RandomSource yakadyarwa kare
